title: Repair invalid UTF-8 em-dashes breaking the Pages build gate
intent: Replace 5 Windows-1252 0x97 bytes (invalid in UTF-8) with proper em-dash characters, and rename mislabeled binary .docx to correct extension, to unblock the GitHub Pages kramdown build.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Replaced 5 invalid 0x97 bytes with UTF-8 em-dash U+2014 in MORPHOLOGY_FAILURE_TAXONOMY.md. Renamed soundhole_calculator_user_guide.md to .docx (was a mislabeled Word document causing non-fatal Pages warnings).
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The Pages build was failing fatally with 'invalid characters for UTF-8'. The binary file rename prevents future confusion and build warnings.

files.intent: Replace invalid Windows-1252 em-dash bytes with UTF-8 em-dash to fix kramdown parse failure.
files.behavior_change: none - encoding fix only, no content change

files.intent: Rename from .md to .docx - file is a Word document, not markdown.
